---
title: "Stanford Pyschology Guide to Doing Open Science"
pagetitle: "Stanford Pyschology Guide to Doing Open Science"
date: "2026-04-05"
date-title: "Date Added"
author: "James Borders"
author-title: "Contributor"
short-description: "This guide was created by researchers in the Stanford Department of Psychology and covers open science-related topics, such as preregistration, sharind data, creating reproducible manuscripts and research."
resource-link: "https://poldrack.github.io/psych-open-science-guide/README.html"
categories:
 - For Scientists
 - Free
 - Guide
 - Preregistration
 - Open Methods
 - Open Data
editor: source
---

----
## About this Resource
{{< meta short-description >}}
\

[Visit Resource]({{< meta resource-link >}}){.btn .btn-outline-primary .btn role="button" data-toggle="button"}
